scripts.build: npm run -w @crucible/editor-client build && npm run -w crucible-vscode-extension build
scripts.test: npm run -w @crucible/editor-client test && npm run -w crucible-vscode-extension test && npm --prefix apps/vscode-extension/webview-ui test
scripts.typecheck: npm run -w @crucible/editor-client typecheck && npm run -w crucible-vscode-extension typecheck && npm --prefix apps/vscode-extension/webview-ui run typecheck
